title: Studio Release — Released ≠ Public, Rollback Metadata, Approval Gate

released_not_equal_public.detail: Both the platform event payload and the workboard job payload carry is_public=False and publication_requires_approval=True. The docstring explicitly documents RELEASE ≠ PUBLIC. No code path transitions a project to public without owner action.

owner_approval_required.detail: Social announcement uses lane='output' in emit_workboard_job. The output lane requires approve_workboard_job() before any post leaves the system (v2_workboard.py pending_approvals() contract). Auto-approval is off by default (owner_policy.json).

previous_status_preserved.detail: release_project() reads the store before calling update_project_status() and captures previous_status from the existing project record. Both the platform event and workboard job carry previous_status.

rollback_metadata.detail: rollback_metadata dict: {rollback_action: 'update_project_status', rollback_target_status: <previous_status>, rollback_note: 'Call update_project_status(id, previous_status) to revert'}. Propagated into both event and job payloads.

social_output_as_draft.detail: Workboard job is queued in lane='output' with is_public=False. The output lane is the review gate — no content posts without pending_approvals() clearance and approve_workboard_job().

deferred.automated_studio_releases: DEFERRED — release_project() queues a draft. Nothing is posted without owner approve_workboard_job() call.

rollback.instructions: To roll back a released project: call update_project_status(project_id, previous_status) using the rollback_target_status from the platform event or workboard job payload. The workboard output-lane job can be rejected via reject_workboard_job() to prevent social posting.

owner_action: For any released project to become publicly visible, the owner must call approve_workboard_job(job_id) on the queued output-lane job, or use the Naga console pending_approvals panel.
notes: Gate 7 code hardening complete. Runtime evidence (actual release of a project with approval flow end-to-end) requires king-server with workboard running. That is pending owner action (see DISPATCH_LOG.md A — deploy workflow enable).
